required_difficulty_tier.description: Soul Savior Scenarios Only. Required difficulty tier for this character to spawn in a wave.

required_mutator.description: Mutator required for this character to spawn.

required_region_boss_defeated.description: Soul Savior Scenarios Only. Required boss to default to get this character to spawn in a wave.

suppress_spawn.description: If Required Covenant is set, Character wont spawn (nor in successive Covenant levels). This is commonly used for covenant 10 to replace a normal enemy with it's chosen variant.

use_boss_character.description: Use boss character. Only used for minibosses
